amendments.text: [For the commuter category airplanes, the following apply: (a) At least one hand fire extinguisher must be located conveniently in the pilot compartment; and (b) At least one hand fire extinguisher must be located conveniently in the passenger compartment.] 83-17; Issued on 09/23/83. --> Link to eCFR --> NPRM ACTIONS:   Notice of Proposed Rulemaking. Notice No. 83-17; Issued on 09/23/83. 23516; Issued on 01/08/87. --> Link to eCFR --> FINAL RULE ACTIONS:   Final Rule. Docket No. 23516; Issued on 01/08/87.
